title: aira cespitosa var. ochroleuca
intro: Aira cespitosa var. ochroleuca, commonly known as Ochroleucous Hairgrass, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the family Poaceae. It is a grass-like perennial that has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antispasmodic effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as soothing digestive issues, reducing fever, and alleviating respiratory problems, due to its high content of flavonoids and other bioactive compounds. In herbal preparations, the leaves and stems of Aira cespitosa var. ochroleuca are often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to treat various health conditions.
